description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 29, 2024 at 1:35 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Mission Street near 9th Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling south westbound on Mission Street in the left lane and came to a stop in a queue of traffic. While the Waymo 
AV remained stationary, a passenger car approached the Waymo AV from behind and the front bumper of the passenger car made contact 
with the rear bumper of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode, and 
a test driver was present in the driver’s seating position. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
